name: Overview of FinMMEval 2026 Task 2: Multilingual Financial Short-Answer Question Answering
summary: arXiv:2607.19867v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: FinMMEval 2026 Task 2 evaluates short-answer financial question answering over multilingual evidence. Each final-test item pairs an English questio...
description: arXiv:2607.19867v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: FinMMEval 2026 Task 2 evaluates short-answer financial question answering over multilingual evidence. Each final-test item pairs an English question with financial statements and news in English, Chinese, Japanese, Spanish, and Greek. Participating systems submit one concise answer per item in JSONL format. The final-test set contains 256 items,...
author: Zhuohan Xie, Xueqing Peng, Georgi Georgiev, Dimitar Dimitrov, Yuyang Dai, Rania Elbadry, Vanshikaa Jani, Lingfei Qian, Fan Zhang, Jimin Huang, Jiahui Geng, Yankai Chen, Ye Yuan, Haolun Wu, Yuxia Wang, Ivan Koychev, Veselin Stoyanov, Mingzi Song, Yu Chen, Xue Liu, Preslav Nakov
